basic_details.job_title: OAV Dongriguda Support Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Warden, Head Cook and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Support Staff (Warden, Head Cook, Asst. Cook, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper)
basic_details.short_information: Odisha Adarsha Vidyalaya Dongriguda has released the official Support Staff (Warden, Head Cook, Assistant Cook, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper) Notification 2026. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced under the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as B.A/B.Sc, Trained in Cookery, Experience in Cooking, or HSC Pass and meeting the prescribed age criteria can apply offline up to 26-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Warden: 30-60 Yrs, Head Cook: 30-40 Yrs, Asst. Cook: 21-32 Yrs, Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: 21-32 Yrs
age_limit.details: Warden: Minimum 30 Years, Maximum 60 Years. Head Cook: Minimum 30 Years, Maximum 40 Years. Asst. Cook: Minimum 21 Years, Maximum 32 Years. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: Minimum 21 Years, Maximum 32 Years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.A/B.Sc, Trained in Cookery, Experience in Cooking, HSC Pass
qualification.details: Warden: B.A/B.Sc from any recognized University with at least 02 years experience in Hostel Management. Head Cook: Trained in Cookery. Asst. Cook: Experience in cooking and other characteristics as specified in the notification. Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper: HSC Pass.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://Nabarangpur.odisha.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the OAV Dongriguda Support Staff recruitment is 26th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Support Staff posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies available for Support Staff positions, including Warden, Head Cook, Assistant Cook, and Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Chowkidar-cum-Sweeper post is HSC Pass.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Warden post is between 30 to 60 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via Speed Post or Registered Post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Head Cook position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Head Cook position is Rs. 9,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the educational qualification for the Warden post?
faq.answer: The educational qualification for the Warden post is B.A/B.Sc with at least 02 years of experience in Hostel Management.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website: https://Nabarangpur.odisha.gov.in/.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based.
